Compact Aeroponic Microgreens Cabinet

FarmCube Neo

Throw and Grow — purpose-built for microgreens. A compact, plug-and-play aeroponic cabinet available in 2-tier and 5-tier configurations, engineered for home kitchens, restaurant back-of-house, central kitchens, and cafés. Food-grade enclosed cabinet, dual-spectrum LED, 10-minute air exchange cycle.

Product Series

Neo-2T vs Neo-5T

Both models share the same 685 × 415 mm footprint and cabinet finishes. Choose your tier count based on output volume requirements. All figures are from the official FarmCube Neo technical datasheet.

Purpose-Built for Microgreens

Throw and Grow — as Simple as it Sounds

Place seeds on the silicon mat inside a biodegradable punnet, press Start. The FarmCube Neo handles irrigation timing automatically. Harvest when ready, discard the punnet — no cleaning, no downtime between cycles.

Available in Black, White, Stainless Steel, and Wooden finishes in 2-tier (24 punnets) or 5-tier (60 punnets) configurations.

Perfect Fit

Counter-Height Design.
Kitchen-Ready.

The Neo-2T fits under standard counters at 960 mm height — no dedicated space required. The fully enclosed food-grade cabinet keeps cultivation clean, quiet, and invisible until you open the door.

Throw and Grow

Three Steps to Fresh Microgreens

GrowSpec's exclusive Throw and Grow system removes complexity from the growing process. Biodegradable and photo-degradable punnets are designed for single-use — no cleaning required after harvest.

01
Scatter Seeds
Place seeds on the silicone growing mat inside the degradable punnet. Apply the light cover to retain moisture during germination — no special equipment needed.
02
Press Start
Insert punnets and press Start on the 2.8-inch smart control screen. Irrigation is pre-programmed — set only the light schedule. The system handles everything else automatically.
03
Harvest & Discard
Harvest when ready. Biodegradable punnets go to compost — no washing, no cleaning, no turnaround delay. Load the next batch immediately.
Punnet Components: Light Cover (reusable) · Seeds · Silicon Sheet · Degradable Punnets (single-use). A light shield during sprouting phase also aids moisture retention.
Tailor-Made Light Spectrums

Two Purpose-Built Spectra for Distinct Outcomes

FarmCube Neo features two engineered light spectrum programs. Each tier can be assigned to either program, allowing simultaneous cultivation of different crop types in a single cabinet.

Tailor-Made Spectrums

Two Spectra, Engineered for Different Outcomes

Lush (Pink) combines red (~660 nm) and blue (~450 nm) light to maximise photosynthetic efficiency — ideal for fast-cycling microgreens like radish and arugula.

Aroma (Icy Blue) is blue-dominant, promoting essential oil synthesis and richer flavour for culinary herbs like basil and cilantro.

Lush
Pink / Purple — Red + Blue dominant
Red light (~660 nm) stimulates stem elongation and leaf expansion for faster growth cycles. Blue light (~450 nm) prevents leggy growth and builds compact, dense structure. Optimised for maximum yield velocity.
Arugula Radish Kale Broccoli Beet
Aroma
Icy Blue — Blue-dominant spectrum
Higher blue-light proportion regulates stomatal opening for CO₂ uptake and promotes synthesis of essential oils and antioxidants. Intensifies flavour, aroma, and pigmentation in culinary herbs.
Basil Parsley Cilantro Colourful Microgreens

Cabinet Air Dynamics

High-Efficiency Ventilation for Stable Microclimate

💨
10 Air Changes per Minute
Even wind distribution across every tier ensures rapid air refresh, reducing heat and moisture build-up while inhibiting pathogen development — critical for consistent microgreen quality.
🌡️
Uniform Temperature & Humidity
Consistent airflow maintains uniform temperature and humidity across all growing tiers, preventing differential growth rates between upper and lower levels.
🛡️
Clean Growing Environment
Fully enclosed food-grade cabinet isolates the growing zone from external contaminants. Combined with rapid air exchange, pathogen risk is significantly reduced.
⚡
Low-Energy Climate Management
High-turnover ventilation is engineered for long-term continuous operation — suitable for professional indoor farming applications requiring 24/7 uptime.

FAQ

Common Questions

What is the Throw and Grow system?

Throw and Grow is GrowSpec's proprietary growing method that reduces the planting process to three steps: scatter seeds in biodegradable punnets, press Start, and harvest. Post-harvest, punnets are discarded (compostable) — eliminating the cleaning step entirely and enabling immediate crop turnaround.

What is the difference between the Lush and Aroma light programmes?

Lush (pink/purple) blends red (~660 nm) and blue (~450 nm) light to maximise photosynthetic efficiency, growth speed, and yield — ideal for radish, arugula, kale, and beet microgreens. Aroma (icy blue) is blue-dominant, stimulating essential oil and antioxidant synthesis for richer flavour and aroma — recommended for basil, parsley, and cilantro.

Which model should I choose — Neo-2T or Neo-5T?

The Neo-2T (24 punnets, 120 W) suits home kitchens, café counters, and lower-volume restaurant use. The Neo-5T (60 punnets, 240 W) is designed for central kitchens, high-volume restaurant back-of-house, and retail-facing display where a continuous, higher yield is required. Both share the same footprint and finish options.

What crops grow best in the FarmCube Neo?

The Neo is optimised for microgreens — radish (up to 3,120 punnets/year in 5T), pea shoots (up to 3,600/year), carrot, cabbage, and basil are documented in the datasheet. The dual-spectrum system also supports culinary herbs where flavour development is a priority.

Does the FarmCube Neo require specialist operation?

No. The unit ships pre-programmed with optimal irrigation timing. Users only set the light schedule via the 2.8-inch control screen. The enclosed, self-contained design requires minimal daily intervention — it is suitable for busy kitchen teams without growing expertise.

Fresh microgreens at the point of service.

Contact our team to discuss Neo-2T or Neo-5T for your kitchen or café, including pricing, delivery, and growing support.
